app.name: DeskPilot
app.tagline: Smart desktop file management. Never deletes without asking.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeSub: Your smart desktop file management assistant
dashboard.noFilesYet: No files tracked yet. Run a scan to get started.

storage.title: Storage Analyzer
storage.subtitle: Find and clean temporary files, caches, and duplicates.
storage.noResults: Click "Scan Drives" to analyze your storage

scanner.title: File Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Discover and classify files in your managed folders.
scanner.noFolders: No managed folders configured. Add folders in Settings.
scanner.useGemini: Use Gemini AI for ambiguous files
scanner.aiHint: Files matching rules are classified instantly. AI handles ambiguous files and will ask you about uncertain ones.

organizer.title: Auto-Organizer
organizer.subtitle: Review the move plan, approve changes, then execute. Every move can be undone.
organizer.dragHint: Tip: Drag files onto category headers or the dock below to reclassify them.
organizer.generateHint: Click "Generate Plan" to create a move plan from classified files
organizer.scanFirst: Make sure you've scanned files first in the Scanner tab

search.title: Search
search.hint: Start typing to search across all tracked files

settings.title: Settings
settings.label: Label
settings.geminiDesc: Used for classifying ambiguous files that don't match any rule. Key is encrypted and stored locally.
settings.organizedRootHint: Files will be organized into subfolders under this path.
settings.scanDepthHint: How deep to scan into folder hierarchies.
settings.themeHint: Switch between dark and light mode.

wizard.welcomeSub: Let's set up your smart desktop file manager
wizard.step2Sub: Select the folders DeskPilot should monitor and organize.
wizard.step3Sub: Add a Gemini API key for AI-powered file classification.

toast.upToDate: You are on the latest version
toast.scanFailed: File scan failed. Check logs for details.
toast.planFailed: Failed to generate move plan. Check logs for details.
